aeo_readiness.summary: While the website has foundational elements, it lacks conversational content and structured data to make it AI-friendly. AI assistants are unlikely to cite them without improvements.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with relevant HVAC questions and answers.
Add a 'HowTo' schema for common HVAC maintenance tasks.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and a high rating, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users.
No active Q&A section to address customer queries.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
No Service schema for specific HVAC services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair near me' or 'best heating services in Oklahoma City'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with HVAC-specific questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating in-depth content on HVAC maintenance and repairs, coupled with expert citations and media mentions.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ and HowTo schema, which are critical for AI to cite them in response to user queries.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy will enhance their content with structured data, conversational language, and authority signals to ensure AI models recognize and recommend them.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search; waiting means losing ground and potential customers.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Guaranteed Air Pro Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI search and boost your lead generation.
page_title: HVAC Services in Norman & Oklahoma City | Guaranteed Air Pro
